title: Niche playbook: vocabulary
description: Niche-specific section names, nav labels, and verb choices. Lets a hospitality niche render "Plan Your Stay" where a contractor niche renders "Get a Quote". Module 2D derives from the top-of-niche reference pool.

sectionNames.description: Niche-specific section labels keyed by the component / section slug.

navLabels.description: Top-nav item labels keyed by route slug.

ctaVerbs.description: Acceptable CTA verbs for this niche. Used by the copywriting framework to vary CTAs across sections without breaking voice.

endCustomer.description: What this niche calls the end customer: "homeowner", "guest", "couple", "patient", "shopper", etc.

categoryNouns.description: Niche-specific terms for service/offering categories. Example: contractor "service", hospitality "experience", e-commerce "category".
